sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 19.90 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.19)

statement.latex: A skew brace is a set$B$equipped with two operations$+$and$$such that$(B,+)$is an additively written (but not necessarily abelian) group,$(B, )$is a multiplicatively written group, and$a (b+c)=ab-a+ac$for any$a,b,c B$.
